_comment: Record of the Wix backend configuration for DA' (Dolce Attires). Mirrors backend/constants.js. Change the data model in Wix and keep constants.js in sync.
_note: Store has 5 products live across the gender / subcategory / legacy collections, each with managed Color×Size variants. See storesCatalog.products and storesCatalog.collections.

project.name: dolce-attires
project.catalogVersionNote: The Store template uses Wix Stores Catalog V1 (verified via GET /stores/v3/provision/version -> V1_CATALOG). There is NO API path to migrate V1 -> V3, so the catalog uses the V1 Stores API. The frontend reads products via the V1 REST API through the authenticated SDK client; cart/checkout use the version-agnostic @wix/ecom + @wix/redirects modules. Product categories, gender, and subcategories are all V1 Stores 'collections' (POST /stores/v1/collections); V1 has no native category hierarchy, so the MEN/WOMEN>TOPS/BOTTOMS>leaf tree lives in backend/constants.js TAXONOMY (mirrored below). Products use POST /stores/v1/products (manageVariants:true, Color+Size productOptions) — variants auto-generated by V1.

oauthApp.name: DA' Storefront (React)
oauthApp.note: Public client ID, safe in the browser bundle. Redirect domains are LOCAL-ONLY (Vite dev 5173 + Vite preview 4173). No production domain; add one here if the site is ever hosted remotely.

cmsCollections.seedStatus: EMPTY — FLAGGED. No real Google reviews were available; none are fabricated. Frontend renders empty/placeholder state until the client supplies real reviews.
EMPTY (correct). Capture collection; populated by real visitors at runtime.
EMPTY (correct). Capture collection; populated by real visitors at runtime.

EMPTY (correct). Pre-order capture collection; populated by real visitors at runtime. Provisioned 2026-06-02. Verified: a live visitor-shaped insert succeeded and was cleaned up (collection left at 0).
cmsCollections.purpose: GUARANTEED pre-order capture / safety net. mutations.submitPreorder() and mutations.placePreorder() insert here so a customer's pre-order intent is recorded even if they abandon the hosted Wix checkout. ADMIN-read; ANYONE-insert. The PRIMARY pre-order path is still a real Wix eCommerce order via the hosted checkout; this collection is the always-on fallback + system of record until the Manual Payment method is enabled in the dashboard.

cmsCollections.seedStatus: Seeded 2026-06-02 with 3 editable rows (hero/1, editorial/1, editorial/2). The image fields are EMPTY by design — no photos have been uploaded to these CMS rows yet. The storefront falls back to its bundled hero/editorial assets until the client uploads a photo into each row's image field via the Wix CMS; getSiteImages() then returns the Wix URL.
cmsCollections.purpose: Lets the client change the HERO photo and the EDITORIAL ('A New Path') photos directly from the Wix CMS. queries.getSiteImages() reads this (public read).

fields.note: client uploads here in the CMS; empty -> frontend uses bundled fallback

storesCatalog.optionsModel: Each LIVE product has a Color option (value = hex swatch, optionType drop_down) and a Size option (S/M/L/XL). Variants are MANAGED (product.manageVariants === true) and auto-generated from the choices by V1. The eCommerce cart/checkout catalogReference MUST use options.variantId (single-level). The chosen Color/Size is resolved to a variantId via POST /stores-reader/v1/products/{id}/variants/query with body { choices: { Color, Size } }. Inventory tracking is OFF (trackInventory: false) so every variant is perpetually in-stock and purchasable/pre-orderable. Color hex values are shared across the catalog: Cream #F5F0E8, White #FFFFFF, Navy #1B2A4A, Black #1A1A1A, Light Blue #A8C4D4.

liveStoreDrift.summary: All 5 recorded products are live on Catalog V1 with managed Color×Size variants. A products query (no filter) returns totalResults: 5, and getProductBySlug() resolves all 5 slugs.
liveStoreDrift.impact: RESOLVED. The 3 recreated products were added to their gender/subcategory/legacy collections (additive). Trousers now holds linen-pants + striped-pants-unisex; the Unisex gender holds striped-pants-unisex; Men + Women each hold the 4 shared pieces (essential-linen-shirt-short-sleeve, linen-shirt-long-sleeve, linen-pants, quarter-zip-sweatshirt). By-design empty leaves remain empty (henleys, polo-shirts, chinos, tailored-pants, blouses, elegant-tops, skirts). The old (404) GUIDs are NOT retained in constants.PRODUCTS — only the current live GUIDs are canonical.
liveStoreDrift.secondaryNote: RESOLVED: the live product with slug 'essential-linen-shirt-short-sleeve' was previously named 'Essential Linen Shirt (Long-Sleeve)' on Wix (a mislabel). It was renamed via PATCH /stores/v1/products/{id} to 'Essential Linen Shirt — Short Sleeve' so name matches slug; the slug is unchanged (essential-linen-shirt-short-sleeve).

preorderFlow.summary: Pre-orders go through the real Wix Store/eCommerce purchase flow. With inventory tracking OFF, every live variant is perpetually orderable. The missing piece on a no-card-processor store is COMPLETING a checkout, which the Manual Payment method enables.
preorderFlow.primaryPath: cart/PDP -> mutations.addToCart()/placePreorder() -> Wix-hosted checkout (createCheckout + @wix/redirects createRedirectSession) -> buyer finalizes with the store's Manual Payment method -> a real Wix eCommerce ORDER (paymentStatus NOT_PAID = the pre-order).
preorderFlow.fallbackPath: mutations.submitPreorder() / the Preorders CMS row inside placePreorder() -> records the pre-order in the Preorders collection (visitor-insert). Always works with the public client ID and NO payment provider.
preorderFlow.dashboardStepRequired: Enable the Manual Payment method once in the dashboard: Settings -> Accept Payments -> set up a Manual Payment Method. No public API enables a payment provider/method (re-verified: the merchant payment-methods list is EMPTY). Until done, the Preorders collection is the working capture channel.

taxonomy._note: MEN/WOMEN > TOPS/BOTTOMS > leaf. V1 has no native hierarchy; this tree is mirrored in backend/constants.js TAXONOMY and shaped over the live collections by queries.getTaxonomy(). productCount per leaf is computed from real product memberships (V1's numberOfProducts counter is unreliable — reads 0).

unisex._note: Flat gender, no Tops/Bottoms tree. Now POPULATED with striped-pants-unisex (v3).

storesCatalog.categoriesNote: Categories/gender/subcategories are all V1 Stores collections. The Wix V1 system 'All Products' collection (id 00000000-000000-000000-000000000001) is excluded from getCategories()/getTaxonomy() — the frontend renders its own 'All' chip. V1's numberOfProducts counter reads 0 for every collection (a lazy/cached V1 reader quirk); authoritative membership is each product's collectionIds, verified via a live products query. Legacy collections (Pants, Sweatshirts, Newest Drops) are KEPT (not deleted) for back-compat; getTaxonomy() surfaces only the gender tree + Newest Drops as featured.
storesCatalog.deliveryNote: The store has a delivery profile with a 'Free shipping' option on an 'International' region (carrierId 45c44b27-ca7b-4891-8c0d-1747d588b835). Auto-selects on the hosted checkout. Client can refine later (CLIENT.md Q4).
storesCatalog.imagesNote: Each of the 5 products has its image uploaded to Wix Media (static.wixstatic.com) and attached as the product's main media. The storefront reads product.image from the Wix media URL — there is no local image fallback.
